query: Our checkout started throwing 500 errors about an hour ago on the sandbox. Can you pull the recent error logs so we can see what's going wrong?
I'm debugging a custom controller and I want to watch the server logs in real time as I hit the endpoint. Is there a way to stream them from the terminal?
We had a payment processing issue yesterday afternoon. I need to search the logs for PaymentProcessor errors between 2pm and 4pm to find the root cause.

Something is intermittently causing a null pointer exception during the order placement flow on staging. I need to grab the last few hundred lines of the error log and filter for anything related to the order pipeline so I can see the full stack trace.

I deployed a hotfix 20 minutes ago and I want to verify it's working. Can I tail the custom-error log on our production instance and filter for the specific error code ERR_INVENTORY_SYNC that was showing up before?

Our support team reported that a customer got a blank page during checkout around 10:15 AM today. I need to pull the warn and error logs for that time window and look for any exceptions in the shipping calculation code.
How do I add error logging calls in my B2C Commerce server-side script? I want to log to a custom log category.
I need to configure Winston logging levels and file transports in my Node.js Express application.
Is there a way to view server logs directly in Business Manager? I'm looking for the log viewer section in the admin panel.
I'm adding a Logger.getLogger('mymodule') call to my script but the log statements aren't showing up. How do I configure the log level for my custom category in the logging preferences?
